reference: Hi. She may have repeated biliary colic, recurrent attacks of gastritis, or she may have urinary tract infections. Therefore, she needs a routine urine test and a liver function test for further evaluation.
text: Aye, she may have repeated biliary cholera, which kind of passes best by this, or she may have urinary tract infections. Therefore, she needs a routine urine test and a liver function test for further evaluation.
